results.title: Nominal transit
results.situation: Telemetry ~18 °C mid-voyage, no customs event — nothing is wrong.

results.title: Cold-chain breach
results.situation: Telemetry spikes to 31.4 °C — the reefer failed, cargo degraded.

results.title: Market price move
results.situation: Coffee's market price jumps ~20% — the asset should be marked to market.

results.title: Held at customs
results.situation: Cargo reaches Rotterdam customs, not yet cleared.

results.title: Cleared + delivered
results.situation: Customs cleared and the cargo has arrived at the destination.

results.title: Telemetry lost
results.situation: Telemetry was nominal, then GPS + telemetry go silent — cargo presumed lost.
